- **Initiative 55 — Brand/Ops continuous improvement loop (2026-05-03)** — Closes I24 *capability* via the partial-capability path (loop tooling ships in this cycle; operator-content phases P1–P5 remain open as **OPS-55-1**). Per the operator reframing of 2026-05-03 ("we operate independently from the advisor … keep improving brand and ops while doing regressions"), this initiative reframes I24 from "fire G-24-3 and close" to a **continuous regression → review → improve → maybe-send loop** with material-change detection. **I55 itself stays Open as a continuous loop** per **D-IH-55-F** (no fixed end date; revisit only if doctrine changes). Release-gate verdict: **PASS (8/8 gates)**; 1751 / 1751 tests pass (was 1691 at I52 closure; +60 net). G-55-loop-1 fired in this cycle; G-24-3 has not (per-fire IRREVERSIBLE; operator-only).

  **P0** Six governance artefacts under [`docs/wip/planning/55-brand-ops-continuous-loop/`](docs/wip/planning/55-brand-ops-continuous-loop/) (master-roadmap with 9 capability phases P0–P8 + L1–L7 continuous loop; decision-log seeded with **D-IH-55-A..F** + execution decisions; evidence-matrix **E1–E11**; risk-register **R-55-1..7** + R-55-2 SMTP-leak grep guard; asset-classification; reports/) plus planning README row marking I55 Active and noting it stays Open as a continuous loop.

  **P6** Regression-loop tooling — *the new heart of I55, operator-content-independent*. New [`scripts/regression_artifact_diff.py`](scripts/regression_artifact_diff.py) compares a current dossier `manifest.json` vs the last-sent baseline `manifest.json` and emits a structured diff record across **5 families of signal**: `cite_counts` (Section 02 totals), `scenario_deltas` (Section 04 churn), `judge_axes` (Sections 03+04 per-axis means + fail counts; Section 04 wins on merge — sized to the I52 P6 dossier surface), `endpoint_cost` (Section 08 endpoint count + ceiling status from I52 P5), `brand_voice` (Section 01 three-light flags + ship verdict). Plus per-file sha256 status (`unchanged` / `changed` / `new` / `removed`). First-cycle handling: when `--last-sent` missing or unreadable, every metric reports `new` and `is_first_cycle=True`. New [`scripts/propose_advisor_update.py`](scripts/propose_advisor_update.py) reads the diff record + `POL-ADVISOR-UPDATE-MATERIAL-THRESHOLD-V1` and emits either `proposal-advisor-send-YYYY-MM-DD.md` (when threshold tripped) or appends a `no` row to `loop-history.md` (when not — **D-IH-55-E both-signal-and-silence**); `--use-defaults` for CI; `--force-proposal` for R-55-5 override; `--allow-first-cycle` for explicit first-send opt-in; `--dry-run` for decision-only. Recipient address never inlined (R-55-2); only GOI/POI `ref_id`. New [`SOP-HLK_REGRESSION_TO_ADVISOR_LOOP_001.md`](docs/references/hlk/v3.0/Admin/O5-1/Marketing/Brand/SOP-HLK_REGRESSION_TO_ADVISOR_LOOP_001.md) codifies the L1–L7 loop, threshold POLICY semantics, and per-fire G-24-3 IRREVERSIBLE doctrine; `status: review` (introduces no new `process_id`; references existing `thi_mkt_prj_1` tranche). New `regression_loop_smoke` verification profile in [`config/verification-profiles.json`](config/verification-profiles.json) runs the **34 unit tests** (11 diff + 23 propose) covering threshold parsing, evaluate, render, append, and main(). **Real-data smoke against I51→I52 closure manifests proposes correctly** (`min_register_rows_added`+`min_files_changed` tripped; expected for I51→I52 closure delta). [`reports/p6-regression-loop-tooling-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/55-brand-ops-continuous-loop/reports/p6-regression-loop-tooling-2026-05-03.md).

  **P7 G-55-loop-1 FIRED** — Material-change threshold POLICY. New `policy_class=update_threshold` enum value in [`akos/hlk_policy_register_csv.py`](akos/hlk_policy_register_csv.py) (mirrors `cost_ceiling` / `judge_threshold` / `flake_threshold` runtime-envelope POLICY pattern). New canonical CSV row `POL-ADVISOR-UPDATE-MATERIAL-THRESHOLD-V1` in [`POLICY_REGISTER.csv`](docs/references/hlk/compliance/dimensions/POLICY_REGISTER.csv): `policy_class=update_threshold`, `owner_role=Brand Manager`, `policy_text` encodes **D-IH-55-D defaults** (`min_changed_scenarios=3 min_judge_axis_movement_pp=2 min_register_rows_added=1 min_files_changed=2`). New test `test_seed_includes_i55_advisor_update_threshold` in [`tests/test_policy_register.py`](tests/test_policy_register.py) **locks the contract** between the POLICY row and the parser — if either drifts, CI fails fast (16/16 policy-register tests pass). End-to-end POLICY lookup verified: `propose_advisor_update.py` (without `--use-defaults`) resolves the row by policy_id and parses the four thresholds. Per **D-IH-55-* P7 execution decisions** the new enum is *separate* from `cost_ceiling` (different unit: count-of-rows vs USD/run; mixing units violates D-IH-52-E). [`reports/p7-threshold-policy-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/55-brand-ops-continuous-loop/reports/p7-threshold-policy-2026-05-03.md).

  **P8 Closure UAT** — Partial-capability close (D-IH-55-C + D-IH-55-F): tooling phases ship; operator-content phases P1–P5 forwarded as **OPS-55-1**. I24 master-roadmap **stays Open** (not Closed at capability) until P1–P5 land. I55 itself stays **Open as continuous loop status**. [`reports/uat-i55-loop-tooling-closure-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/55-brand-ops-continuous-loop/reports/uat-i55-loop-tooling-closure-2026-05-03.md). 8/8 gates: strict inventory PASS, drift PASS (no drift), `py scripts/test.py all` PASS (1751 passed / 7 skipped), `validate_hlk.py` PASS (POLICY_REGISTER ok with new `update_threshold` row), `release-gate.py` PASS (8/8 incl. browser smoke + API smoke + process_list header + vault links). Planning README row updated; CHANGELOG entry written.

  **What waits for OPS-55-1** — P1 Wave-2 Section 2 fill (`BRAND_VOICE_FOUNDATION.md` + `BRAND_REGISTER_MATRIX.md` + `BRAND_DO_DONT.md`; D-IH-17 forbids invention); P2 Wave-2 Section 3 fill (6 GOI/POI voice profiles); P3 I24 P1 SOP finalize + `process_list.csv` tranche `thi_mkt_dtp_NN` (G-24-2; CSV-before-SOP per SOP-META); P4 `GOI_POI_REGISTER.csv` ALTER + Supabase mirror migration (G-24-1); P5 `compose_adviser_message.py` finalize (depends on P1–P2 brand voice content). The loop tooling does **not** depend on these: a regression cycle today produces a diff and either a proposal or a no-proposal log entry; what changes once OPS-55-1 lands is the *content quality* of any proposed message.

- **Initiative 54 — Surface test hardening / Playwright + axe-core (2026-05-03)** — Closes the I49 impeccable-critique line-53 follow-up (`OPS-49-craft-followups`). Promotes MADEIRA control plane + dossier HTML surfaces from HTTP-smoke + ad-hoc to **DOM-tested + axe-core-wired** with a release-gate-grade severity contract. Release-gate verdict: **PASS (8/8 gates)**; 47 / 49 in focused test sweep (2 SKIP intentional). Live axe-core audit forwarded as **OPS-54-1** (operator-side dev-tooling install + run cycle).

  **P0** Six governance artefacts under [`docs/wip/planning/54-surface-test-hardening/`](docs/wip/planning/54-surface-test-hardening/) (master-roadmap, decision-log with D-IH-54-A..D, evidence-matrix E1-E9, risk-register R-54-1..4, asset-classification, reports/) plus planning README row.

  **P1** axe-core wiring. New [`requirements-dev.txt`](requirements-dev.txt) introduces the DEV-scope dep `axe-playwright-python>=0.1.4,<0.2` (MIT, minor-version pinned). [`scripts/browser-smoke.py`](scripts/browser-smoke.py) extended with: `AXE_AVAILABLE` import guard (graceful degrade, mirrors `PLAYWRIGHT_AVAILABLE`); new `--axe` CLI flag; `AXE_IN_SCOPE_SURFACES` registry (today: `axe_madeira_control` → `/madeira/control` per **D-IH-54-C** scope); `_summarise_axe_violations()` impact-tier counter; `_check_axe_for_url()` enforcing **D-IH-54-A** severity logic (Critical>0 → FAIL; Critical=0+Serious>0 → PASS with warn-only-first-cycle detail; Critical=0+Serious=0 → PASS); `run_axe_audits()` orchestrator with R-54-1 / R-54-4 graceful SKIP semantics (no-Playwright, no-axe-package, worker-unusable, gateway-unreachable). `main()` routes axe results through three branches. [`reports/p1-axe-wiring-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/54-surface-test-hardening/reports/p1-axe-wiring-2026-05-03.md).

  **P2** DOM-level scenarios. New [`tests/playwright/__init__.py`](tests/playwright/__init__.py) (package marker). New [`tests/playwright/test_madeira_control_a11y_dom.py`](tests/playwright/test_madeira_control_a11y_dom.py) — 16 tests (8 wiring for the I54 P1 helpers + 8 DOM-source contract for the live Playwright run's locator stability: `role=status`, `aria-live=polite`, locale buttons `data-locale-set=en/es/fr`, mode buttons `#btn-ask` + aria-pressed, focus-visible rule, `<main>` landmark, no external CDN, no `alert()` keyboard trap). New [`tests/playwright/test_dossier_html_a11y.py`](tests/playwright/test_dossier_html_a11y.py) — 11 source-level + 2 conditional-render tests for `akos.dossier.html_render.render_dossier_html` template-level a11y contract (R-54-3 mitigation: template-time, not data-time). 25 / 25 PASS + 2 SKIP intentional (conditional-render fallback) in 0.25s. [`reports/p2-dom-scenarios-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/54-surface-test-hardening/reports/p2-dom-scenarios-2026-05-03.md).

  **P3** a11y audit — **dispatcher-validation only** (stub-mode; mirrors I52 P3 / I52 P5 / I53 P3 pattern; this cursor session does not have PyPI access to install `axe-playwright-python`, so per **R-54-4** the documented response is the stub-mode pass with **OPS-54-1 forwarded**). Two per-surface reports filed: [`reports/a11y-audit-madeira-control-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/54-surface-test-hardening/reports/a11y-audit-madeira-control-2026-05-03.md) + [`reports/a11y-audit-dossier-html-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/54-surface-test-hardening/reports/a11y-audit-dossier-html-2026-05-03.md). Each carries zero findings as the dispatcher-validation outcome; both will be overwritten with live findings tables when OPS-54-1 fires. [`reports/p3-audit-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/54-surface-test-hardening/reports/p3-audit-2026-05-03.md).

  **P4 G-54-1 NO-FIRE this cycle** — dispatcher-validation mode means no live Critical findings to react to; the gate has no input. The redesign baseline is preserved as-shipped at I49 P15 (`static/madeira_control.html` unchanged). G-54-1 re-arms for the OPS-54-1 cycle. Decision-log row written. [`reports/p4-fix-findings-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/54-surface-test-hardening/reports/p4-fix-findings-2026-05-03.md).

Two steps: (a) `playwright_dom_a11y_unit_tests` (`__pytest__ tests/playwright/ -v`; runs without Playwright installed); (b) `browser_smoke_axe_audit` (`scripts/browser-smoke.py --playwright --axe`; SKIPs gracefully when Playwright workers unusable or axe-playwright-python missing). Per **D-IH-54-B** the profile is opt-in at pre-commit (warn-only) and Critical-only-blocking at release-gate. [`docs/USER_GUIDE.md`](docs/USER_GUIDE.md) §16.3 browser-smoke flag table extended with `--axe` row + cross-link to I54 planning folder. 5 / 5 verification-profiles tests PASS (locked the new profile shape + argv; argv lint caught the `-m pytest` form which was fixed to the canonical `__pytest__` token). [`uat-i54-surface-test-hardening-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/54-surface-test-hardening/reports/uat-i54-surface-test-hardening-2026-05-03.md).

Acceptance: both `reports/a11y-audit-*-YYYY-MM-DD.md` reports overwritten with per-impact counts; G-54-1 evaluation; CHANGELOG row if any Critical fix lands.
  - **OPS-49-craft-followups** flips closed-architecturally (line 53 of impeccable critique addressed by I54 P0-P5 wiring; live operator run is the residual OPS-54-1 cycle).

  **Decisions activated:**

  - **D-IH-54-B** (pre_commit warn + release_gate Critical-only gate) — active as `playwright_a11y_smoke` profile shape.

The dossier already has the placement structure (Section 8 cost-rollup + endpoint subsection from I52 P6); the next-cycle wiring is a small additive change.

  **What this initiative shipped (one-paragraph summary):** End-to-end wiring of axe-core into the existing Playwright surface tests with a release-gate-grade severity contract, plus 27 new DOM-source-contract + wiring tests that lock the I49 P15 redesign locator stability, plus a new `playwright_a11y_smoke` verification profile, plus USER_GUIDE coverage. The live operator run that produces the actual findings table is **OPS-54-1**; everything else is shipped.

- **Initiative 53 — GraphRAG PoC closure / closes I46 P3-P7 (2026-05-03)** — **Closes Initiative 46 (Neo4j Strategic Posture)** end-to-end on the documented **no-ship path**. Drove the I46 P3 scaffold (`scripts/graphrag_poc.py`, `config/graphrag/golden_queries.json`, 20 queries) and the I46 P5 conditional-ship infrastructure (`retrieval_mode` column on `SKILL_REGISTRY.csv`, `pol_neo4j_graph_rag_eligibility` POLICY row, `akos/intent.py` dispatch, `tests/test_neo4j_graph_escape.py` adversarial probes, `tests/test_neo4j_retrieval_mode.py`, `scripts/graphrag_drift_canary.py`) through audit-and-verification. **G-53-1 NO-FIRE** (R-53-4 anticipated): live A/B requires R-46-1 operator-funded $20 envelope + `AKOS_GRAPHRAG_POC_LIVE=1` + provider env keys + `pip install neo4j-graphrag-python`, none of which were available this cycle. Per **D-IH-53-C non-additive trade-off** (forbids partial-credit ship; requires ≥1 of ≥3pp accuracy lift / ≥30% latency reduction / ≥40% cost reduction), no-fire ⇒ no-ship. Decision logged as `D-IH-46-Decision-P3-NO-SHIP-2026-05-03` in both decision-logs. Release-gate **PASS (8/8 gates)**.

  **P0** Six governance artefacts under [`docs/wip/planning/53-graphrag-poc-closure/`](docs/wip/planning/53-graphrag-poc-closure/) (master-roadmap, decision-log with D-IH-53-A..D, evidence-matrix E1-E8, risk-register R-53-1..4, asset-classification, reports/) plus planning README row.

  **P1** Golden-set audit. `py scripts/graphrag_poc.py --validate-config` PASS (20 queries; 60% multi-hop / 40% single-hop per D-IH-53-B; 70% require graph traversal beyond a single CSV-row lookup). Pre-flight cost estimate: ~$10 / $20 envelope (R-53-1 mitigated; abort threshold $25 not approached); embedding cost via `nomic-embed-text` (Ollama, $0); retrieval-LLM ~$0.10 (20 queries × ~1.5k tokens / ~0.3k tokens at Sonnet rates); multi-judge accuracy scoring ~$0.80 (I52 roster consensus, well under POL-EVAL-COST-CEILING-JUDGE-V1 envelope). Operator opt-in surface documented. [`reports/p1-golden-set-audit-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/53-graphrag-poc-closure/reports/p1-golden-set-audit-2026-05-03.md).

  **P2** PoC infra audit. `py scripts/graphrag_poc.py --dry-run` PASS (lists 20 queries + cost ceiling $20.00 + planned A/B paths). Live-mode env-guard verified (no env → exits 2 with R-46-1 reference; with env → LIVE MODE banner + scaffold notice). `validate_skill_registry.py` enum constraint enforced (`{"", "vector_only", "graph_rag", "hybrid"}`; typos rejected). 46 graph/Neo4j tests PASS in 5.21s. [`reports/p2-poc-infra-audit-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/53-graphrag-poc-closure/reports/p2-poc-infra-audit-2026-05-03.md).

  **P3** A/B run report — **NO-FIRE governance event.** Mirrors I52 P3 / P4 / P5 stub-mode pattern (the no-fire is documented as a governance event, not a failure). **OPS-53-1 forwarded** to next AKOS_RECORD_LIVE cycle (likely shared with OPS-52-1 multi-judge real-API calibration burn — one operator-funded cycle for both). [`reports/p3-ab-run-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/53-graphrag-poc-closure/reports/p3-ab-run-2026-05-03.md).

  **P4** Ship/no-ship verdict (G-53-1) — **NO-SHIP this cycle.** Bar evaluation: zero of three D-IH-46-E bars met (none could be evaluated). `D-IH-46-Decision-P3-NO-SHIP-2026-05-03` row written into both [`46-neo4j-strategic-posture/decision-log.md`](docs/wip/planning/46-neo4j-strategic-posture/decision-log.md) and [`53-graphrag-poc-closure/decision-log.md`](docs/wip/planning/53-graphrag-poc-closure/decision-log.md). **P5 SKIPPED** (CSV flip + POLICY clone require ship signal; infrastructure preserved ship-ready). [`reports/p4-ship-no-ship-verdict-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/53-graphrag-poc-closure/reports/p4-ship-no-ship-verdict-2026-05-03.md).

  **P6** Test wiring + canaries — non-conditional verification all green. 46 graph/Neo4j tests PASS in 3.51s. `py scripts/graphrag_drift_canary.py --csv-only` prints all 10 dimensions (CSV row counts visible without live Neo4j; per I46 P2 graceful-degradation design). `neo4j_governance_kg_drift_smoke` profile wired in [`config/verification-profiles.json`](config/verification-profiles.json). Adversarial probes (graph-escape + citation spoofing) green. Cassettes folder `tests/evals/cassettes/graph_rag/` preserved. [`reports/p6-test-wiring-canaries-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/53-graphrag-poc-closure/reports/p6-test-wiring-canaries-2026-05-03.md).

  **P7** Closure UAT. Verification matrix: `legacy/verify_openclaw_inventory.py` PASS, `check-drift.py` PASS, `release-gate.py` **PASS (8/8 gates)**, `validate_hlk.py` PASS, `graphrag_poc.py --validate-config` PASS, `graphrag_poc.py --dry-run` PASS, 46 graph/Neo4j tests PASS, drift canary CSV-only smoke PASS. Both **I46 and I53 master-roadmaps flipped to `Closed`**. [`reports/uat-i46-i53-graphrag-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/53-graphrag-poc-closure/reports/uat-i46-i53-graphrag-2026-05-03.md).

  **OPS register flips:**
  - **OPS-53-1 created + forwarded** — first operator-funded live GraphRAG PoC A/B run on `SKILL-MADEIRA-LOOKUP-V1` (20 queries × 2 modes; multi-judge accuracy scoring via I52 roster); ~$10-15 estimated within R-46-1 $20 envelope; bound to next operator-funded `AKOS_RECORD_LIVE=1` window.
  - **OPS-52-1** (real-API multi-judge calibration burn from I52 P3) — re-confirmed forwarded; likely shared with OPS-53-1.

  **Decisions activated:** D-IH-53-A (judge model — re-use I52 roster), D-IH-53-B (60% multi-hop / 40% single-hop), D-IH-53-C (non-additive trade-off; partial-credit forbidden), D-IH-53-D (rollback procedure: CSV flip + cassettes preserved).

  **Gates:** G-53-1 NO-FIRE → no-ship; G-53-2 + G-53-3 SKIPPED (conditional on ship signal).

  **What this initiative shipped (one-paragraph summary):** End-to-end audit + closure of the GraphRAG PoC track that has been Open at I46 since 2026-05-01. The no-fire / no-ship path is **not** a regression — nothing in the runtime has changed; vector-only baseline remains operational for `SKILL-MADEIRA-LOOKUP-V1`. The GraphRAG infrastructure (column, POLICY row, dispatch, canary, adversarial probes, scaffold, golden queries, cassettes folder) remains ship-ready for the next AKOS_RECORD_LIVE cycle when OPS-53-1 fires with the operator-funded $20 envelope.

- **Initiative 52 — Multi-model LLM-judge live activation + RunPod/Kalavai cost discipline (2026-05-03)** — **Architecturally closes OPS-47-8** (`score_response_live` no longer raises `NotImplementedError`; multi-judge dispatcher fully wired end-to-end: code → roster file → calibration burn → CI dispatch → spend cap → cost surface). Closes **OPS-51-1** (persona-keyed cassette dispatch handled by multi-judge harness mode). Forwards **OPS-52-1** (operator-on-demand real-API multi-judge calibration burn) and **OPS-52-2** (first real-API RunPod / Kalavai endpoint run) to next AKOS_RECORD_LIVE cycle. Release-gate verdict: **PASS** across all 8 gates; **1691 tests PASS, 5 skipped, 6 warnings, 106.83s**.

  **P0 — Governance scaffold.** Six artefacts under [`docs/wip/planning/52-multi-model-judge-and-cost-discipline/`](docs/wip/planning/52-multi-model-judge-and-cost-discipline/) (master-roadmap, decision-log with D-IH-52-A..F, evidence-matrix E1-E12, risk-register R-52-1..6, asset-classification, reports/) plus planning README row. **Operator direction (2026-05-03):** "All models we can — we praise ourselves on being multi-model. Cost management for RunPod / Kalavai endpoints."

  **P1 — Roster survey + selection (G-52-1 fired).** Pinned initial multi-judge roster in new governed file [`prompts/judge/JUDGE_ROSTER_V1.md`](prompts/judge/JUDGE_ROSTER_V1.md): position 1 `anthropic:claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022` (tie-break primary), position 2 `openai:gpt-4o` (tie-break secondary; flagged legacy per OpenAI 2026-Q2; pricing retained for cassette reproducibility). Documents N=2 flagship consensus default, cheap-tier opt-in via `AKOS_JUDGE_ROSTER_CHEAP`, and per-endpoint judge eligibility (≥80% alignment in P3 burn). New system prompt [`prompts/judge/JUDGE_PROMPT_V1.md`](prompts/judge/JUDGE_PROMPT_V1.md) defining the 3-axis JSON-only output schema (`brand_voice`, `citation`, `persona_fit`) and reproducibility contract. [`reports/p1-roster-survey-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/52-multi-model-judge-and-cost-discipline/reports/p1-roster-survey-2026-05-03.md).

  **P2 — Multi-judge dispatcher (`JudgeRoster`).** Replaced `NotImplementedError` in [`akos/eval_harness/judge.py::score_response_live`](akos/eval_harness/judge.py) with a `JudgeRoster.score(...)` call gated by `AKOS_JUDGE_ROSTER` env. New `JudgeRoster` dataclass with `from_env()`, `fingerprint()`, and `score()` methods; `MemberScore` per-member output dataclass; `MemberScorer` callable type for test injection. Implemented `_default_member_scorer` per-provider dispatcher with graceful offline fallback when API keys or `AKOS_JUDGE_LIVE_API=1` are missing (per-member, not whole-roster). Three composition modes: `_compose_consensus` (majority vote with position-1 tie-break; default), `_compose_per_axis` (axis-specific routing with position-1 fallback), `_compose_tiered` (placeholder; collapses to position-1 for now). `score_response` top-level dispatcher prioritises `AKOS_JUDGE_ROSTER` over legacy `AKOS_JUDGE_MODEL` when `AKOS_RECORD_LIVE=1`. New [`tests/test_eval_judge_multi.py`](tests/test_eval_judge_multi.py) (32 tests covering construction, fingerprint stability, all three composition modes, `JudgeRoster.score()` integration, fallback paths, and dispatcher logic); existing `tests/test_eval_judge.py` updated for new `NotImplementedError` message. [`reports/p2-judge-roster-dispatcher-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/52-multi-model-judge-and-cost-discipline/reports/p2-judge-roster-dispatcher-2026-05-03.md).

  **P3 — Calibration burn (D-IH-52-B activated; closes OPS-51-1; forwards OPS-52-1).** New [`scripts/judge_calibration_burn.py`](scripts/judge_calibration_burn.py) loads N representative active scenarios (default 50), generates a deterministic agent-response stub, scores it with both `score_response_offline` and `JudgeRoster.score()`, and computes per-axis alignment between the two paths. Emits markdown report + JSON sidecar to [`artifacts/judge-calibration/`](artifacts/judge-calibration/). Includes a "DISPATCHER VALIDATION ONLY" banner when `AKOS_JUDGE_LIVE_API` is unset or API keys are missing so dispatcher-validation runs cannot be confused with live calibration. **First burn returned 100% / 100% / 100% alignment** (offline-fallback for both members; trivial alignment) — this is the dispatcher-validation outcome. **D-IH-52-B activated:** consensus default kept; per-axis specialization and cost-aware tiered escalation deferred until a real-API burn (OPS-52-1) surfaces axis-specific divergence. **OPS-51-1 closes** (persona-keyed cassette dispatch is now handled by the multi-judge harness; no separate cassette-layout work needed). New [`artifacts/judge-calibration/README.md`](artifacts/judge-calibration/README.md) tracked; `*.json`/`*.md` outputs gitignored. [`reports/p3-calibration-burn-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/52-multi-model-judge-and-cost-discipline/reports/p3-calibration-burn-2026-05-03.md).

  **P4 — Threshold refresh (G-52-2 NO-FIRE this cycle).** Conditional on P3 calibration burn surfacing any axis below 80% alignment. P3 returned 100% / 100% / 100% (dispatcher-validation mode), so **G-52-2 does not fire this cycle**. Existing `POL-EVAL-JUDGE-THRESHOLD-{BRAND-VOICE,CITATION,PERSONA-FIT}-V1` rows stand at `min_pass_score=4` (unchanged since I47/P12). Gate re-arms for fire on (1) real-API calibration burn (OPS-52-1) producing alignment <80% on any axis, (2) roster member rotation exposing axis <80% in next dispatcher burn, or (3) operator-initiated `POL-EVAL-JUDGE-THRESHOLD-*-V1` edit (CSV-edit gate per AKOS governance). Mirrors I51/P4's G-51-2 pattern (definition shipped; runtime fire on first operator-driven payload). [`reports/p4-threshold-refresh-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/52-multi-model-judge-and-cost-discipline/reports/p4-threshold-refresh-2026-05-03.md).

  **P5 — Endpoint cost surface (G-52-4 wired; D-IH-52-D + D-IH-52-E activated).** Introduced the **per-GPU-hour endpoint cost surface** alongside the existing per-token surface. New `CostRecord(unit=…)` discriminator (`"token" | "gpu_hour"`) enforced at construction time; `compute_cost_record(unit=…)` is the single dispatch entry point. New [`config/eval/endpoint-prices.json`](config/eval/endpoint-prices.json) SSOT (RunPod A100/H100 + Kalavai default; FinOps-owned; quarterly refresh) — physically separate from `model-prices.json` per **D-IH-52-E** (no mixed-unit aggregation). Two new POLICY rows in [`POLICY_REGISTER.csv`](docs/references/hlk/compliance/dimensions/POLICY_REGISTER.csv): `POL-EVAL-COST-CEILING-ENDPOINT-RUNPOD-V1` (`max_usd_per_hour=4.00`) and `POL-EVAL-COST-CEILING-ENDPOINT-KALAVAI-V1` (`max_usd_per_hour=1.00`); `cost_ceiling` row count 8 → 10 (5 skill-level I45 P4 + 3 runtime-envelope I50 P2 + **2 endpoint-envelope I52 P5**). New [`scripts/endpoint_cost_probe.py`](scripts/endpoint_cost_probe.py) emits markdown + JSON sidecar to `artifacts/endpoint-cost/`; `--stub` fixture for dispatcher validation; `--runs-jsonl` for real operator-curated logs. New [`scripts/endpoint_envelope_alarm.py`](scripts/endpoint_envelope_alarm.py) is the G-52-4 hard-fail gate (exit 2 on >20%-over-ceiling band; soft-warn 10-20%; symmetry with D-IH-45-D). 30 new tests in [`tests/test_eval_cost_endpoint.py`](tests/test_eval_cost_endpoint.py). New tracked README + gitignore for `artifacts/endpoint-cost/`. [`reports/p5-endpoint-cost-surface-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/52-multi-model-judge-and-cost-discipline/reports/p5-endpoint-cost-surface-2026-05-03.md).

  **P6 — Dossier surface for judge axes + endpoint cost subsection.** Two new gather functions in [`akos/dossier/sources.py`](akos/dossier/sources.py): `gather_madeira_judge_axis_fail_summary` (per-axis FAIL count + worst-axis trend + judge member roster captured from latest `eval-scorecard-*.json`) and `gather_madeira_endpoint_cost_summary` (per-endpoint runs/hours/per-hour/projected-24h/status table from latest `endpoint-cost-probe-*.json` sidecar). Three new dossier surfaces wired in [`akos/dossier/sections.py`](akos/dossier/sections.py): (a) Section 03 madeira-flavor judge-axis fail summary block with worst-axis trend; (b) Section 04 worst-axis cross-reference (so persona calibration outliers can be inspected against judge-axis FAILs at a glance); (c) Section 08 new "Endpoint cost surface" subsection with per-status operator-action one-liner column ("Scale endpoint <eid> down NOW; per-hour $X.XXXX breaches POL ceiling >20% (alarm hard-fail band)." for FAIL; "Investigate <eid>: per-hour $X.XXXX within 10-20% of ceiling; projected_24h=$YY.YY." for WARN; "OK; per-hour $X.XXXX, projected_24h=$YY.YY." for PASS). All three surfaces honestly render "not yet" states when upstream data is missing — multi-judge has not been live yet (E9), and endpoint probes are operator-driven. Section 8 visibly enforces D-IH-52-E by keeping the pre-existing per-token rollup (`madeira_cost_rollup` with `per_judge_axis`) physically separate from the new per-GPU-hour endpoint subsection. 22 new tests in [`tests/test_dossier_judge_axes_endpoint.py`](tests/test_dossier_judge_axes_endpoint.py); 299 dossier tests pass. [`reports/p6-dossier-surface-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/52-multi-model-judge-and-cost-discipline/reports/p6-dossier-surface-2026-05-03.md).

  **P7 — CI activation (G-52-3 + G-52-4 fired).** [`eval-tier-b.yml`](.github/workflows/eval-tier-b.yml) now exposes `AKOS_JUDGE_ROSTER` (default empty — preserves legacy single-judge / offline path; opt-in via `workflow_dispatch judge_roster` input or repo-level `vars.AKOS_JUDGE_ROSTER`) and `MAX_JUDGE_USD_PER_RUN` (default `15.0` per **D-IH-52-C**; scales with roster size) env vars across the 4-D matrix. New parallel `endpoint-envelope-gate` job runs once per workflow after the `tier-b` matrix completes; calls `scripts/endpoint_cost_probe.py --stub` then `scripts/endpoint_envelope_alarm.py --stub` and exits non-zero on hard-fail-band breach. Stub today; pivots to `--runs-jsonl` once OPS-52-2 produces operator-curated RunPod / Kalavai run logs (one-line swap, contract identical). All three jobs gated on `vars.AKOS_TIER_B_ENABLED == 'true'`. I51 P5 `calibration-drift-gate` job preserved unchanged. 16 new workflow-shape tests in [`tests/test_i52_p7_tier_b_multi_judge_endpoint.py`](tests/test_i52_p7_tier_b_multi_judge_endpoint.py); 47 tier-b tests pass; YAML round-trips. **OPS-47-8 architecturally closes** at this phase (multi-judge dispatcher fully wired end-to-end: code → roster → CI → spend cap → cost surface). [`reports/p7-ci-activation-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/52-multi-model-judge-and-cost-discipline/reports/p7-ci-activation-2026-05-03.md).

  **P8 — Closure UAT.** Verification matrix: `legacy/verify_openclaw_inventory.py` PASS, `check-drift.py` PASS, `test.py all` PASS (1691 / 1696), `release-gate.py` **PASS (8/8 gates)**, `validate_hlk.py` PASS (158 / 158), `render_uat_dossier.py --filter madeira --mode snapshot --format all` emitted with Section 8 endpoint subsection populated (`madeira_endpoint_probe_present=true`, 3 endpoints, `worst_envelope_status=PASS`). Decisions activated: **D-IH-52-A** (roster), **D-IH-52-B** (consensus default), **D-IH-52-C** ($15 envelope), **D-IH-52-D** (unit discriminator), **D-IH-52-E** (no mixed-unit aggregation). **D-IH-52-F** (multi-judge cassette retention) documented; will fire on first roster `model_id` rotation event. Gates: G-52-1 fired (P1), G-52-2 NO-FIRE (P4; re-armed), G-52-3 + G-52-4 fired (P7). [`uat-i52-multi-model-judge-and-cost-discipline-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/52-multi-model-judge-and-cost-discipline/reports/uat-i52-multi-model-judge-and-cost-discipline-2026-05-03.md).

  **What this initiative shipped (one-paragraph summary):** The multi-model LLM-judge framework end-to-end (code → roster file → calibration burn → CI dispatch with $15-per-run envelope) plus the per-GPU-hour endpoint cost surface (RunPod / Kalavai) wired through unit-discriminated `CostRecord`, separate `endpoint-prices.json` SSOT, two new `POL-EVAL-COST-CEILING-ENDPOINT-*-V1` rows, an envelope alarm script, a Section 8 dossier subsection with per-status operator-action one-liners, and a new `endpoint-envelope-gate` job in `eval-tier-b.yml`. **OPS-47-8 closes architecturally**; live activation is a one-line operator opt-in via `vars.AKOS_JUDGE_ROSTER`.

- **Initiative 51 — Persona calibration cleanup (2026-05-03)** — Closes **R-47-2** (calibration drift) and **OPS-47-9** (mirror reseed) from the I47 closure UAT, plus **OPS-47-6** (calibration audit/remediation deferred from I47). Forwards **OPS-50-1** to I52 P3/P4 as **OPS-51-1** (persona-keyed cassette dispatch belongs in the multi-judge harness mode). **Outliers reduced from 13 / 17 personas at I47 P10 baseline to 0 / 17 at I51 P3 closure.** Release-gate verdict: **PASS** across all 8 gates; 1591 tests PASS, 5 skipped.

  **P0 — Governance scaffold.** Six artefacts under [`docs/wip/planning/51-persona-calibration-cleanup/`](docs/wip/planning/51-persona-calibration-cleanup/) (master-roadmap, decision-log with D-IH-51-A..D, evidence-matrix E1-E8, risk-register R-51-1..2, asset-classification, reports/) plus planning README row.

  **P1 — Mirror reseed (closes OPS-47-9 data plane).** Added `_emit_persona_scenario_registry_upserts()` to [`scripts/sync_compliance_mirrors_from_csv.py`](scripts/sync_compliance_mirrors_from_csv.py) and `--persona-scenario-registry-only` CLI mode. CSV → `compliance.persona_scenario_registry_mirror` row-count parity verified at **329 = 329**. Mechanically enforces the D-IH-51-D "after every CSV tranche edit" cadence. [`reports/p1-mirror-reseed-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/51-persona-calibration-cleanup/reports/p1-mirror-reseed-2026-05-03.md).

  **P2 — Calibration audit.** Deterministic 13-outlier baseline anchored to `artifacts/calibration/calibration-baseline-20260503T172852Z.json`. Two thin-N personas (CUSTOMER-SERVICE-PROSPECT, IDEA-PROPOSER; n=6 each) flagged as the explicit candidates for the "≤2 personas may remain outside tolerance" allowance at the P3 exit. [`reports/calibration-audit-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/51-persona-calibration-cleanup/reports/calibration-audit-2026-05-03.md) + [`reports/p2-calibration-audit-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/51-persona-calibration-cleanup/reports/p2-calibration-audit-2026-05-03.md).

  **P3 — D-IH-51-A executed; G-51-1 GREEN with 0 / 17 outliers (R-47-2 closes).** New `target_difficulty_band` column on [`PERSONA_SCENARIO_REGISTRY.csv`](docs/references/hlk/compliance/dimensions/PERSONA_SCENARIO_REGISTRY.csv) (13 / 17 personas with explicit overrides; 4 / 17 fall through to global 40/40/10/10). Calibrator `akos/eval_harness/persona.py` extended with `_resolve_persona_target` per-persona target dispatch + `target` / `target_source` on `CalibrationResult`; `render_calibration_markdown` now surfaces `t/m/h/i target` + `source` columns (closes **C-51-B**). Validator `scripts/validate_persona_scenario_registry.py` enforces format + per-persona consistency. New DDL migration [`supabase/migrations/20260503180000_i51_persona_scenario_target_difficulty_band.sql`](supabase/migrations/20260503180000_i51_persona_scenario_target_difficulty_band.sql). 4 personas iteratively refined post-P2 against the verification loop (CUSTOMER-SERVICE-PROSPECT, IDEA-PROPOSER, EXISTING-PARTNER, RANDOM-INBOUND); see phase report for the P2-proposed → P3-final table. **OPS-50-1 architectural verdict**: cassette dispatch is `(skill_id, probe_id)`-keyed, not persona-keyed; `--persona` is a post-run filter. Persona-keyed cassettes belong in I52's multi-judge harness mode → forwarded as **OPS-51-1** (avoids parallel cassette-layout churn). 10 new tests in `tests/test_persona_scenario_registry.py` (33 / 33 PASS). [`reports/p3-rebalance-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/51-persona-calibration-cleanup/reports/p3-rebalance-2026-05-03.md).

  **P4 — D-IH-51-B executed; flake-threshold POLICY + bulk auto-quarantine.** New POLICY row `POL-EVAL-FLAKE-THRESHOLD-V1` with `policy_class=flake_threshold` (extension to `VALID_POLICY_CLASSES`) and `policy_text="min_consecutive_failures=3"` (POLICY_REGISTER 29 → 30 rows). [`scripts/quarantine_scenario.py`](scripts/quarantine_scenario.py) extended with `--auto-from-flake-history <path.json>` mode that reads the threshold from the new POLICY row and bulk-quarantines scenarios whose `consecutive_failures` count meets or exceeds it. Operator-judgement single-row path (`--scenario-id` + `--reason`) preserved. **G-51-2** is a runtime gate — fires on first operator-driven `--auto-from-flake-history` payload; not fired in I51 (no live flake-history input processed). 9 new tests in `tests/test_scenario_quarantine.py` (16 / 16 PASS). [`reports/p4-flake-threshold-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/51-persona-calibration-cleanup/reports/p4-flake-threshold-2026-05-03.md).

  **P5 — D-IH-51-C executed; `--hard-fail-on-drift` wired to `eval_tier_b_weekly` only.** New `calibration-drift-gate` job in [`.github/workflows/eval-tier-b.yml`](.github/workflows/eval-tier-b.yml) (single-invocation, `needs: tier-b`, 5-minute timeout). Job runs `py scripts/calibrate_scenarios.py --hard-fail-on-drift` against the per-persona `target_difficulty_band` values, exits non-zero on any persona outside ±5pp of its own band, and uploads the resulting `calibration-baseline-*.{md,json}` as a 90-day-retention artifact. Pre-commit stays warn-only by design — D-IH-51-C deliberately bounds the hard-fail surface to the weekly Tier-B profile so operators can iterate freely on `target_difficulty_band` without per-keystroke gating; no `.pre-commit-config.yaml` calibration hook exists in the repo. Local dry-run: `py scripts/calibrate_scenarios.py --hard-fail-on-drift --quiet` → exit 0. [`reports/p5-ci-tightening-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/51-persona-calibration-cleanup/reports/p5-ci-tightening-2026-05-03.md).

  **P6 — Closure UAT + CHANGELOG + planning README + WIP_DASHBOARD.** Closure UAT [`reports/uat-i51-persona-calibration-cleanup-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/51-persona-calibration-cleanup/reports/uat-i51-persona-calibration-cleanup-2026-05-03.md); planning README row flipped to **Closed (2026-05-03)**; WIP_DASHBOARD re-rendered. Release-gate verdict: **PASS** across all 8 gates; 1591 tests PASS, 5 skipped, 0 failed. **R-47-2 closes**, **OPS-47-9 closes**, **OPS-47-6 closes**, **OPS-50-1 → OPS-51-1** (forwarded to I52 P3/P4), **C-51-A** + **C-51-B** + **C-51-C** carriers closed.

[`reports/p1-publish-and-baseline-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/50-live-cycle-closure/reports/p1-publish-and-baseline-2026-05-03.md).

POLICY total 26 → 29; cost_ceiling 5 → 8. New [`tests/test_model_prices.py`](tests/test_model_prices.py) — 18 tests including 2026-Q2 reference price hard-pin, output ≥ input invariant, cheap-tier strictly cheaper than flagship. FINOPS counterparty alignment closed N/A this cycle (placeholder rows only). Spend $0.00 / $5.00 envelope (100% headroom; cap mechanism wired through `--max-spend 5`). Run `dossier-c3d5c001e610` at git SHA `b2bfd87`; manifest sha256 `1db895e3...`. All three runs `overall_status: pass`; total spend $0.00 / $5 per run; cost ceiling announced + honored via `POL-EVAL-COST-CEILING-PERSONA-V1`.
