Release-gate verdict: **PASS** across all 8 gates; 1571 tests PASS, 0 failed.

- **Initiative 49 — MADEIRA management verdict rollup (2026-05-03)** — Closes the management-layer gap that converted I02 / I47 / I48 infrastructure into a repeatable monthly verdict, a triaged backlog, an unblocked Tier-3 lane, and a redesigned operator surface. Three-tier doctrine (vault SOP / `process_list` / repo guides) plus a three-light GO criterion and a MADEIRA-flavored dossier emit.

  **Wave A — foundation (P0–P4).** Initiative folder + 6 governance artefacts under `docs/wip/planning/49-madeira-management-rollup/` (master-roadmap, decision-log with D-IH-49-A..H, evidence-matrix, risk-register, asset-classification, scenario-taxonomy) plus [`madeira-program-index.md`](docs/wip/planning/49-madeira-management-rollup/madeira-program-index.md). **P2** extended `PERSONA_SCENARIO_REGISTRY.csv` with canonical columns `priority_score` (deterministic Reach × Impact / Effort in `akos/hlk_persona_scenario_priority.py`), `safety_lane`, `release_blocking` (D-IH-49-A), `scripts/recalculate_persona_scenario_priorities.py` + `calibrate_scenarios.py --write-priority-scores`, `scripts/migrate_persona_registry_i49_columns.py`, additive mirror migration `supabase/migrations/20260503120000_i49_persona_scenario_registry_priority_columns.sql`, and `coverage-matrix.md` sort with `I49_review_order` (safety-first). **P3** Part H *Verdict & cadence* in `MADEIRA_HARDENING_CONSOLIDATED_PLAN.md` plus `USER_GUIDE.md` §24.2.1 cross-link. **P4** `akos/docker_engine_probe.py` + `py scripts/doctor.py --docker-sandbox` + optional `AKOS_REQUIRE_DOCKER_PREFLIGHT=1` Playwright hard-fail hook + UAT prereqs.

  **Wave B — canonical governance (P5–P8).** **P5** `process_list.csv` +7 rows (`env_tech_ws_madeira_quality` + six `env_tech_dtp_madeira_{verdict,dossier,incident,lifecycle,telemetry,uxreview}`); deck/governance counts refreshed (1100 processes; 28 temas); dispatcher + graph parity tests bumped; D-IH-49-B logged. **P6** four vault SOPs under `docs/references/hlk/v3.0/Admin/O5-1/Tech/System Owner/`: `SOP-MADEIRA_VERDICT_AND_CADENCE_001.md`, `SOP-MADEIRA_INCIDENT_RESPONSE_001.md`, `SOP-MADEIRA_SCENARIO_LIFECYCLE_001.md`, `SOP-MADEIRA_UX_REVIEW_001.md` (each citing the dossier section that proves execution; bidirectional verification contract); vault `index.md` cross-links added. **P7** repo operator guides [`docs/guides/madeira_operator_quickstart.md`](docs/guides/madeira_operator_quickstart.md), [`madeira_contributor.md`](docs/guides/madeira_contributor.md), [`madeira_dossier_workflow.md`](docs/guides/madeira_dossier_workflow.md) plus cross-links in `docs/README.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `docs/guides/first_time_contributor.md`. **P8** finalised cursor rule [`.cursor/rules/akos-madeira-management.mdc`](.cursor/rules/akos-madeira-management.mdc) (full doctrine, globs, escalation map).

  **Wave C — dossier extension (P9–P12).** **P9** `--filter madeira` saved profile on `scripts/render_uat_dossier.py`; `DossierFilter` extended with `flavor` + `skill_id`; `Section01ExecutiveSummaryMadeira` + `compute_madeira_three_lights` (Sections 3-6 → conversational lane; Section 8 → operator + Surface lanes); `akos/dossier/madeira_preset.py` carries the persona/initiative/skill_id roster; `single_persona_for_cli` helper guarantees CLIs that match a single id stay correct under a CSV roster; `compliance.dossier_run.section_metrics` records `flavor='madeira'`; `dossier-section-spec.md` extension. **P10** `lifecycle_status` enum extended with `quarantined` (D-IH-49-C); `scripts/quarantine_scenario.py` (atomic CSV rewrite, `I49-QUARANTINE` dated note); Section 4 surfaces `quarantined_scenarios_count`. **P11** `scripts/promote_telemetry_to_scenario.py` clusters `~/.openclaw/telemetry/madeira-answer-quality-*.jsonl` into JSON proposals (operator-merged per SOP §5.4; never auto-applied). **P12** Section 8 `MADEIRA cost rollup` block (per-mode / per-persona / per-judge-axis from latest `eval-history` scorecard) + `scripts/lint_brand_voice_offline.py` (BRAND_JARGON_AUDIT §4 forbidden tokens, frontmatter + backtick-path skipping) wired into `pre_commit` as step `brand_voice_lint_smoke`.

  **Wave D — Surface UX (P13–P16).** **P13** [`docs/guides/madeira_langfuse_dashboard.md`](docs/guides/madeira_langfuse_dashboard.md) (saved-view JSON + UI walkthrough). **P14** Impeccable shape brief at [`reports/impeccable-shape-madeira-control-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/49-madeira-management-rollup/reports/impeccable-shape-madeira-control-2026-05-03.md) (operator approval gate). **P15** rewrite of [`static/madeira_control.html`](static/madeira_control.html): OKLCH tokens with `prefers-color-scheme` + `prefers-reduced-motion`, `<main>` landmark, `aria-pressed` toggle pair, `role="status"` ↔ `role="alert"` panel, en/es/fr i18n dictionary, query-param + browser locale detection, no external CDN; post-craft critique at [`reports/impeccable-critique-madeira-control-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/49-madeira-management-rollup/reports/impeccable-critique-madeira-control-2026-05-03.md). **P16** Section 8 `MADEIRA Surface UX` subsection reads the critique artefact via `gather_madeira_surface_signals` and emits `madeira_surface_ship` / `madeira_surface_detail` for the third light.

  **Wave E — closure (P17).** Closure UAT [`reports/uat-i49-madeira-management-2026-05-03.md`](docs/wip/planning/49-madeira-management-rollup/reports/uat-i49-madeira-management-2026-05-03.md); first MADEIRA-flavored dossier emitted (`artifacts/uat-dossier/uat-dossier-20260502T232643Z/`); 8 new tests suites land (`tests/test_priority_score.py`, `tests/test_doctor.py`, `tests/test_dossier_madeira_flavor.py`, `tests/test_scenario_quarantine.py`, `tests/test_telemetry_promotion.py`, `tests/test_brand_voice_lint.py`, `tests/test_madeira_control_a11y.py`, `tests/test_madeira_control_i18n.py`) with regression tests across `tests/test_persona_scenario_registry.py`, `tests/test_eval_persona_calibration.py`, `tests/test_validate_hlk_dispatcher.py`, `tests/test_sync_compliance_mirrors_from_csv.py`, `tests/test_holistik_ops_axis_graph.py`, `tests/test_company_deck.py`. `validate_hlk` OVERALL PASS, `validate_persona_scenario_registry` PASS, `validate_hlk_vault_links` PASS. Operator follow-ups: live-mode dossier weekly + monthly Tier-3 verdict + Supabase migration apply for the I49 column extension + quarterly UX audit per `SOP-MADEIRA_UX_REVIEW_001`.- **Initiative 48 follow-up — Inline screenshot embed in dossier HTML (D-IH-48-K, 2026-05-02)** — Closes the contract gap between `akos/dossier/runner.py::take_browser_screenshots` (which only created the `screenshots/` directory) and the operator-visible deliverable. `render_dossier_html(run, screenshots=...)` now appends an "Appendix A — Operator screenshots" `<details>` block with each PNG as `<img src="data:image/png;base64,...">`. Preserves D-IH-48-I standalone-file invariant (no JS / no CDN / no remote fonts / no relative path needed); CSP meta tag widened from `default-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'` to add `img-src 'self' data:` so inline data URIs render. Best-effort: missing files / non-PNG entries silently skipped; empty list yields no appendix. `scripts/render_uat_dossier.py` reordered to gather screenshots BEFORE HTML render so they embed. 6 new tests added to `tests/test_dossier_html_full.py` covering present / absent / mixed-validity cases (56 dossier-suite tests PASS). Verified end-to-end via the operator follow-up #4: 7 screenshots of the OpenClaw Control SPA (`/health`, `/docs`, `/madeira/control`, `/hlk/graph/explorer` + 3 graph-explorer interaction states including a live-rendered AIC role graph from the Neo4j mirror) inlined into a 400 KB standalone `dossier.html`. Decision recorded in `docs/wip/planning/48-operator-dossier/reports/followup-execution-2026-05-02.md`.

- **Initiative 48 follow-up — Operator Console (qualitative companion HTML, 2026-05-02)** — Adds `akos/dossier/console_render.py` and a sibling artifact `dossier-console.html` emitted alongside `dossier.html` whenever `--format html` (or `--format all`) is passed. Standalone HTML (no JS / no CDN / no remote fonts; D-IH-48-I posture preserved). Nine panels: cover + system status pills, trend small-multiples (last 20 runs from `index.json`), persona × difficulty heatmap (drawn from `PERSONA_SCENARIO_REGISTRY.csv`), 8 diversified scenario sample cards (prompt / expected / forbidden / skill / route / topic chips), decisions taken across the last three initiatives (D-IH-46/47/48 with reversibility badges), skill registry visual, recent dossier runs timeline with eval-pass-rate bars, and one recorded cassette transcript per skill (drawn from `tests/evals/cassettes/<skill_id>/*.jsonl`). Closes the operator-flagged "qualitative thinness" gap — the dossier now answers *what was asked, what the system did, what was decided*. Best-effort: if the console renderer fails for any reason the main dossier still ships. New tests at `tests/test_dossier_console.py` (12 PASS); doc sync in USER_GUIDE §24.1.1 + ARCHITECTURE Orchestration Library row.

- **Initiative 48 — Operator-facing UAT Dossier (2026-05-02)** — Ships `scripts/render_uat_dossier.py`: one command emits a timestamped pack under `artifacts/uat-dossier/` (markdown + optional PDF/HTML + `manifest.json`). **Modes:** `snapshot` (offline artifact read), `live` (CLI orchestration via `akos/dossier/runner.py`), `tier-b` (env-gated `AKOS_DOSSIER_TIER_B=1` + `MAX_DOSSIER_USD`). **Package:** `akos/dossier/` (`DossierRun`, twelve sections, `sources.py`, `sparkline.py`, `html_render.py`, `pdf_render.py`, `dossier_run_writer.py`). **P7 trends:** migration `supabase/migrations/20260502140000_i48_dossier_run_mirror.sql` creates append-only `compliance.dossier_run`; writer POSTs when Supabase service-role env is set and always appends `artifacts/uat-dossier/index.json` for offline sparklines; Section 11 renders four inline SVG series when history + current rollup yields ≥2 points. **Governance:** `POL-DOSSIER-RUN-RETENTION-V1` (`policy_class=retention`); `validate_policy_register` now accepts `retention`. **CI:** `eval-tier-b.yml` uploads per-matrix-cell dossier artifacts; new opt-in `.github/workflows/dossier-on-pr.yml` (repo var `AKOS_DOSSIER_ON_PR`) posts executive summary via `actions/github-script`. **Verification:** `dossier_smoke` profile + final `pre_commit` step calling snapshot dossier; doc sync in ARCHITECTURE, USER_GUIDE §24.1.1, DEVELOPER_CHECKLIST, DEV_VERIFICATION_REFERENCE. Closure UAT: `docs/wip/planning/48-operator-dossier/reports/uat-i48-operator-dossier-2026-05-02.md`.

- **Initiative 47 — User-centric UAT modernisation: persona-driven scenario library + LLM-judge + persona prompts + 4 tech debt fixes (2026-05-02)** — Closes the gap from the I46 closure UAT: every cassette assumed operator voice/intent. I47 ships a 326-scenario library across all 16 PERSONA_REGISTRY archetypes (operator + Tier-1 ×4 + Tier-2 ×8 + Tier-3 ×4), calibrated to the D-IH-47-C 40/40/10/10 difficulty distribution within ±5pp tolerance, plus persona-conditioned MADEIRA prompts (D-IH-47-I; user-mandated), LLM-as-judge 3-axis scoring (D-IH-47-J; brand_voice + citation + persona_fit), tenant_id joint-axis prep (D-IH-47-K; 0.25w now vs 3w retrofit when I34 lands), hybrid synthetic+opt-in-real chaos (D-IH-47-L), and 4 tech debt items closed (sync_hlk_neo4j 6-dim writes; sync_compliance bool fix; agent_memory_trigger_watcher; eval_run live writes). **P0 — Bootstrap**: 6 planning artifacts (5 standard + new `scenario-taxonomy.md` defining the 5 typed scenario dimensions: persona_id × skill_id × scenario_class × difficulty_class × expected_outcome_class) + decision-log with 12 D-IH-47-A..L decisions (8 original + 4 RICE-expansion: I/J/K/L) + 14 risks (8 original + 6 RICE: R-47-9..14) + planning README row 47 + WIP_DASHBOARD re-render. **P1 — PERSONA_SCENARIO_REGISTRY**: 8th canonical HLK dimension. New canonical [`PERSONA_SCENARIO_REGISTRY.csv`](docs/references/hlk/compliance/dimensions/PERSONA_SCENARIO_REGISTRY.csv) with 16-column header (5 typed dims + tenant_id NULL-default per D-IH-47-K) + akos contract + validator + dispatcher integration + new TOPIC_REGISTRY row `topic_persona_scenario_registry` (28 topics now) + Supabase migration with `(persona_id, tenant_id)` composite index + partial index on non-NULL tenant_id (I34 multi-tenant prep). 21 new tests. **P2-P5 — Persona scenario libraries**: 225 persona scenarios authored: P2 25 operator (across all 5 skills; admin-verb-on-code → ESCALATE; cannot_answer → REFUSE), P3 100 Tier-1 (INVESTOR-COLD/WARM + ADVISOR-REFERRAL + CUSTOMER-KIRBE-PROSPECT @ 25 each; bridge-person-by-name; cap-table-only-after-1-on-1; KiRBe trial flow), P4 80 Tier-2 (8 personas × 10; advisor-cold + partner JE/SC + talent + vendors I/O + existing customer/partner), P5 20 Tier-3 (press + idea-proposer + random-inbound + customer-service-prospect). **P6 — Cross-axis stress**: 25 scenarios spanning ≥3 of 6 Holistik Ops axes (persona × channel × distance × language × artifact-class × topic); 3 scenarios span ALL 6 axes (Channel 6 ZFM + LATAM + 3-language equity deals). **P7 — Adversarial persona**: 30 scenarios across 5 categories (impersonation 6 + indirect injection 6 + persona-context jargon 6 + tier-jumping 6 + cross-persona leakage 6); ALL 30 expect REFUSE; R-47-4 mitigated via SYNTHETIC names (Pedro/Mark/Carla/etc; no real identities). **P8 — Benchmark adapters**: 30 scenarios across 3 LIGHT adapters (LongMemEval-LIGHT 10 testing retrospective-memory REFUSAL per I46 P4 ADR + MASEval-LIGHT 10 testing full intent→router→skill→response chain integrity + Promptfoo curated 10 vectors for governance-assistant threat surface). **P9 — Recovery + chaos**: 16 scenarios (15 synthetic mocks for Neo4j down/Aura auth/mirror stale/cost breach/registry missing/cassette stale + 1 opt-in real-chaos scenario per D-IH-47-L); new [`scripts/recovery_chaos_runner.py`](scripts/recovery_chaos_runner.py) with 4 safety gates (AKOS_REAL_CHAOS_OK env opt-in + NEO4J_URI host forbidden-list + interactive operator confirmation + Aura API key requirement); 10 new tests. **P10 — Per-persona scorecard + calibration**: ScoreRow extended with `persona_id` + `difficulty_class` + `scenario_class` + `judge_scores: dict[str,int]` (D-IH-47-F); `Scorecard.to_markdown()` emits per-persona breakdown + LLM-judge axis sections; new [`akos/eval_harness/persona.py`](akos/eval_harness/persona.py) (filter_scenarios + aggregate_by_persona + calibration_distribution + render_calibration_markdown); new [`scripts/calibrate_scenarios.py`](scripts/calibrate_scenarios.py) operator CLI; new `--persona <id>` + `--difficulty <class>` + `--calibrate` flags on [`scripts/eval.py`](scripts/eval.py); new Supabase migration extending `compliance.eval_run` with persona_id + difficulty_class + scenario_class + judge_scores JSONB columns + 4 new partial indexes; cumulative library calibration: __overall__ trivial=11.0% / moderate=40.8% / hard=40.2% / impossible=8.0% (within ±5pp of D-IH-47-C target). 25 new tests. **P11 — Persona-conditioned MADEIRA prompts (D-IH-47-I; user-mandated)**: new canonical [`prompts/overlays/PERSONA_OVERLAY.md`](prompts/overlays/PERSONA_OVERLAY.md) framework + 4 per-persona override fragments at [`prompts/personas/<persona_id>/MADEIRA_HINTS.md`](prompts/personas/) for all 4 Tier-1 personas (each ≤500 chars per D-IH-47-I); `assemble-prompts.py --persona <id>` flag lazy-loads framework + per-persona hints; soft-fails if persona fragment missing; persona-conditioned MADEIRA SWAPS OUT `OVERLAY_HLK_GRAPH.md` (1241 chars) for headroom (R-47-9 mitigation; persona context replaces graph traversal awareness for non-operator flows); all 4 personas under bootstrapMaxChars (936-1158 chars headroom each); R-47-14 mitigation via test asserting ≥15/20 MADEIRA_BASE invariant lines persist. 22 new tests. **P12 — LLM-as-judge 3-axis (D-IH-47-J; RICE B HIGH)**: new [`akos/eval_harness/judge.py`](akos/eval_harness/judge.py) with 3-axis scoring (brand_voice / citation / persona_fit; 1-5 scale; default ≥4 pass threshold from POLICY_REGISTER); deterministic offline mode (heuristic substring rules; cost = $0.00; CI-safe); live mode (`score_response_live`) is gated NotImplementedError until operator pins API contract; dispatcher routes to offline by default (live requires `AKOS_RECORD_LIVE=1` AND `AKOS_JUDGE_MODEL=<id>` env vars); cost-cap aggregation (per-scenario + overall); 3 new POLICY_REGISTER rows `POL-EVAL-JUDGE-THRESHOLD-{BRAND_VOICE,CITATION,PERSONA_FIT}-V1` (`policy_class=judge_threshold` extension; encoded `min_pass_score=4` in policy_text); 3 rows reseeded to `compliance.policy_register_mirror`; R-47-10 mitigation (operator-pinned model_id captured in JudgeResult); R-47-11 mitigation (cost-cap default $0.01/scenario via `--judge-cost-cap`). 24 new tests. **P13 — Tech debt cleanup (D-IH-47-G)**: 4 items closed from I46 UAT cycle. (1) `akos/hlk_neo4j.py:sync_csv_graph()` extended to write all 10 dimensions (was 4); 6 new MERGE batches for Persona/Channel/Sourcing/Skill/TouchpointKitCell/Policy + per-axis UNDER_TOPIC edge writer via label→key dispatcher; closes I46 P2 drift canary catch (csv=N neo4j=0 [DRIFT] for 6 dims). (2) `scripts/sync_compliance_mirrors_from_csv.py:_emit_skill_registry_upserts` boolean column emit fix: `tools_required_waived` receives true/false/NULL keywords (not quoted ''); closes I46 P7 22P02 invalid-input-syntax error. (3) New [`scripts/agent_memory_trigger_watcher.py`](scripts/agent_memory_trigger_watcher.py) cron-ready watcher per I46 P4 ADR; 3 triggers (multi-tenant load via SKILL_REGISTRY tenant_scope check + conversation depth via compliance.eval_run query placeholder + compliance ask via MANUAL_FIRE.txt operator-input); writes JSON report to `artifacts/agent-memory-triggers/`. (4) New [`akos/eval_harness/eval_run_writer.py`](akos/eval_harness/eval_run_writer.py) wires `compliance.eval_run` live writes via stdlib `urllib.request` (no new dependency); best-effort skip-when-env-missing (`SUPABASE_URL` + `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY`); `scripts/eval.py` integration writes per-row after every `run_modes()` returns; defensive try/except (writer is advisory). 12 new tests. **P14 — Tier B 4-D matrix extension (D-IH-47-H)**: extended `.github/workflows/eval-tier-b.yml` from 1-D matrix (model_tier) to 4-D (`model_tier × persona × scenario_class × judge_axis`); persona dim explicit (5 cells: OPERATOR + 4 Tier-1; Tier-2/3 opt-in via workflow_dispatch persona_filter input per D-IH-47-H); scenario_class + judge_axis dims aggregated in scorecard markdown (not matrix; would 7x runtime); MAX_PERSONA_USD per-persona spend cap (default $1; R-47-3 mitigation); AKOS_JUDGE_COST_CAP per-scenario cap (default $0.01; R-47-11); SUPABASE_URL + SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY env exposed for P13 item 4 live writes; --persona flag wired through all 3 eval invocations (Tier A baseline + Tier B replay + Tier B adversarial); per-cell artifact naming (eval-scorecards-MODEL-PERSONA); job summary surfaces compliance.eval_run writer stats. Default cell count: 2×5=10 cells per weekly run (~$10/week worst-case; ~$77 with judge active). 20 new tests. **P15 — Closure**: full pytest sweep `1180 passed, 5 skipped, 0 failed` (excluding 2 pre-existing `tests/validate_configs.py::TestOpenclawConfig` operator-local openclaw.json sandbox.mode='all'-vs-'strict' failures unrelated to I47); `validate_hlk` OVERALL PASS now includes `PERSONA_SCENARIO_REGISTRY: PASS` (326 rows, 17 personas) + `TOPIC_REGISTRY: PASS` (28 rows) + `POLICY_REGISTER: PASS` (25 rows incl. 3 new judge_threshold); `eval --mode all` overall_status PASS; UAT report at [`reports/uat-i47-user-centric-uat-2026-05-02.md`](docs/wip/planning/47-user-centric-uat/reports/uat-i47-user-centric-uat-2026-05-02.md); WIP_DASHBOARD re-rendered. **134 new tests across 7 NEW suites** (test_persona_scenario_registry 21 + test_recovery_chaos_runner 10 + test_eval_persona_calibration 25 + test_persona_overlay 22 + test_eval_judge 24 + test_i47_p13_tech_debt 12 + test_i47_p14_tier_b_persona_matrix 20). **3 new mirror migrations** (`compliance.persona_scenario_registry_mirror` + `compliance.eval_run` persona/difficulty/scenario_class/judge_scores extensions + `compliance.policy_register_mirror` 3 judge_threshold rows reseeded). **3 new POLICY_REGISTER rows** (judge_threshold class extension; total POLICY_REGISTER grew 22 → 25 rows). **8 new akos modules / scripts** (akos/hlk_persona_scenario_csv + akos/eval_harness/{persona,judge,eval_run_writer} + scripts/{calibrate_scenarios,recovery_chaos_runner,agent_memory_trigger_watcher,validate_persona_scenario_registry}). **Operator follow-ups**: push branch + open PR; set Tier B repo secrets if missing (OPENAI/ANTHROPIC/LANGFUSE/SUPABASE service_role); live MADEIRA dashboard UAT; run sync_hlk_neo4j live to verify P13 item 1 closes drift canary; review 13 personas outside calibration tolerance (R-47-2; rebalance vs accept); approve first real-chaos run when ready (D-IH-47-L); approve LLM-judge live mode + pin model_id (D-IH-47-J + R-47-10).

- **Initiative 46 — Neo4j Strategic Posture: doctrine + GraphRAG PoC scaffold + agent memory ADR (2026-05-01)** — Writes the missing doctrine that has accumulated unwritten across I7 → I23 → I25 → I32. Per **Tianpan.co "GraphRAG in production 2026"**: *Neo4j Graphiti is explicitly NOT for document retrieval — it is for agent memory*. The doctrine separates 3 independent use-cases and sets per-use-case posture. Sister initiative to [I45](#initiative-45) (closed earlier today): I46 P5 retrieval_mode column sits alongside I45 P3 routing_condition column on SKILL_REGISTRY, closing the routing+grounding loop. **P0 — Bootstrap + audit**: 5 planning artifacts + decision-log with 7 D-IH-46-A..G decisions ratified at greenlight + [`audit-current-neo4j-surface-2026-05-01.md`](docs/wip/planning/46-neo4j-strategic-posture/reports/audit-current-neo4j-surface-2026-05-01.md) cataloguing the 4 read endpoints (`/hlk/graph/summary`, process+role neighbourhood, explorer), 3 MCP tools, 1 Streamlit explorer, 1 `OVERLAY_HLK_GRAPH.md` overlay, 1 `@pytest.mark.neo4j` live test class, and the 8 cross-cutting findings. **P1 — NEO4J_STRATEGY.md doctrine** (D-IH-46-C + D-IH-46-F): new vault sub-area `docs/references/hlk/v3.0/Envoy Tech Lab/Neo4j/` with [`NEO4J_STRATEGY.md`](docs/references/hlk/v3.0/Envoy%20Tech%20Lab/Neo4j/NEO4J_STRATEGY.md) (~225 lines) — 3-use-case framing (A governance KG built; B GraphRAG PoC; C agent memory deferred), per-use-case doctrine (what it IS for, what it is NOT for, decision-frame for new features), library choice (D-IH-46-A: `neo4j-graphrag-python` LightRAG-style hybrid; rejects Microsoft GraphRAG full + vector-only), cross-repo posture (D-IH-32-M restated permanent: AKOS Neo4j ≠ KiRBe Neo4j; do not cross-merge), cost envelope (Aura free tier 0.6% utilized; LightRAG ~$0.50-2 per Tianpan.co 2026), portability posture (HLK CSV vault stays SSOT), operator-known gotchas (AKOS_API_KEY SPA fallback; broken-chain TLS; password truncation lesson from D-IH-32-Q). 3 cross-references shipped (OVERLAY + kirbe-sync §11 + EXTERNAL_REPO_CONTRACT_TEMPLATE optional Neo4j section); success metric "cited by ≥3 other docs" met. **P2 — Use-case A governance KG hardening**: new `akos.hlk_neo4j.skill_neighbourhood(session, skill_id, depth, limit)` helper (first axis-6 traversal surface; returns Skill + Topic + Role owner + sibling skills under shared topics; bounded depth/limit; R-46-7 mitigation gates POLICY_REGISTER expansion); new MCP tool `hlk_graph_skill_neighbourhood` registered in [`scripts/hlk_graph_mcp_server.py`](scripts/hlk_graph_mcp_server.py); `madeira` role allowlists the new tool in `agent-capabilities.json`; new [`scripts/graphrag_drift_canary.py`](scripts/graphrag_drift_canary.py) compares Neo4j label counts to CSV row counts across all 10 dimensions (3 modes: default / `--csv-only` / `--json`; 1-row tolerance; SKIPs gracefully when Neo4j unconfigured); new verification profile `neo4j_governance_kg_drift_smoke`; 10 new tests. **P3 — GraphRAG PoC scaffold (D-IH-46-A + D-IH-46-D + R-46-1)**: new [`config/graphrag/golden_queries.json`](config/graphrag/golden_queries.json) with 20 queries for `SKILL-MADEIRA-LOOKUP-V1` across 5 intent classes (lookup / multihop / graph_traversal / anomaly_detection / doctrine_lookup); new [`scripts/graphrag_poc.py`](scripts/graphrag_poc.py) with `--validate-config` / `--dry-run` / live modes (live requires `AKOS_GRAPHRAG_POC_LIVE=1` env guard per R-46-1) + `--max-spend` cost ceiling (default $20); 14 new tests. Live mode is intentionally a SCAFFOLD; actual `neo4j-graphrag-python` indexing implementation lands when operator opts in via env guard + `pip install neo4j-graphrag-python` + LLM provider credentials + cost confirmation. **P4 — Agent memory ADR (D-IH-46-B operationalized; R-46-4 mitigation)**: new [`AGENT_MEMORY_DEFERRED_ADR.md`](docs/references/hlk/v3.0/Envoy%20Tech%20Lab/Neo4j/AGENT_MEMORY_DEFERRED_ADR.md) (~155 lines) — Status ACCEPTED 2026-05-01; decision: do NOT build agent/user memory KG in I46; defer until trigger fires. 3 trigger conditions (operator picks; default = Trigger 1 = Multi-tenant load via I34): Trigger 2 = Conversation depth (≥10% MADEIRA traces with skills_invoked_count ≥4 in 7d window); Trigger 3 = Compliance ask (highest urgency; non-deferrable). 4-step evaluation framework when trigger fires (Step 1 buy vs build with default Zep/Graphiti at 63.8% LongMemEval per AgentMarketCap 2026; Step 2 schema sketch; Step 3 privacy + retention; Step 4 eval suite). 12-month sunset clause (review-not-revive). **P5 — Conditional GraphRAG ship scaffold (D-IH-46-E + D-IH-46-A)**: `SKILL_REGISTRY.csv` extended with `retrieval_mode` column (16th field; new `VALID_RETRIEVAL_MODES` enum: empty | vector_only | graph_rag | hybrid; all 5 existing rows carry empty default for back-compat); `scripts/validate_skill_registry.py` enforces the enum; new POLICY_REGISTER row `POL-NEO4J-GRAPH-RAG-ELIGIBILITY-TEMPLATE` (`policy_class=graph_rag_eligibility`; template-only; operator clones per-topic-class with PoC numbers attached); new migration [`20260501070000_i46_skill_registry_retrieval_mode.sql`](supabase/migrations/20260501070000_i46_skill_registry_retrieval_mode.sql) (idempotent ALTER TABLE + partial index); legacy `akos/eval_harness.py` deletion finally staged (the file was filesystem-deleted in I45 P1 when the module became a package, but git index hadn't tracked the deletion); 12 new tests. Per-skill activation is operator-pending on P3 PoC outcome (decision-log entry `D-IH-46-Decision-P3-2026-MM-DD`). **P6 — Test wiring (R-46-2 mitigation foundation)**: 3 NEW graph-escape adversarial cassettes under `tests/evals/cassettes/adversarial/SKILL-MADEIRA-LOOKUP-V1/` (`ge_simple_role_id_lookup`, `ge_persona_id_direct`, `ge_process_item_id_direct` — verify simple direct lookups STAY on CSV path even when classify_request output mentions graph terms; guards against R-46-2 over-eager-routing once GraphRAG ships); GraphRAG cassette directory scaffold at `tests/evals/cassettes/graph_rag/` with `README.md` documenting activation flow (operator runs P3 PoC → records ship → records initial cassettes via `eval.py record --kind live_llm`); WIP_DASHBOARD operational health surface added (hand-written below auto-render markers; 5 live signals: Neo4j drift / eval Tier A / cassette PII / adversarial / promotion gate; operator-runs commands + operator-recorded "Last green" column); 10 new tests. **P7 — Tests + UAT + closure**: full pytest sweep `1103 passed, 5 skipped, 2 pre-existing failures` (the same `validate_configs.py::TestOpenclawConfig` Pydantic openclaw.json sandbox-mode literal_error failures from BEFORE the i45-i46 branch — confirmed via `git diff` showing zero changes to openclaw.json.example, akos/models.py, or tests/validate_configs.py); UAT report covering all 8 phases; WIP_DASHBOARD re-rendered; CHANGELOG entry. Mid-P7 caught and fixed: my I46 P1 addition to `OVERLAY_HLK_GRAPH.md` had pushed `MADEIRA_PROMPT.standard.md` over the 20000-char `bootstrapMaxChars` limit (20324 chars) breaking 7 `tests/validate_multimodel.py` tests; shortened the doctrine pointer note from ~325 chars to ~80 chars; new size 19731 chars; tests green. **46 new tests across 4 NEW suites** (test_neo4j_usecase_a_hardening 10 + test_graphrag_poc 14 + test_neo4j_retrieval_mode 12 + test_neo4j_graph_escape 10). **2 new mirror migrations** combined with I45 (this branch ships 4 new migrations total). **3 new POLICY_REGISTER rows** (1 per-skill cost_ceiling shipped via I45 P4 + 1 promotion_gate via I45 P7 + 1 graph_rag_eligibility template via I46 P5). Closure trail at [`reports/uat-i46-neo4j-strategic-posture-2026-05-01.md`](docs/wip/planning/46-neo4j-strategic-posture/reports/uat-i46-neo4j-strategic-posture-2026-05-01.md). Operator follow-ups itemised: P3 PoC live indexing (cost-confirmed), P5 conditional ship per PoC verdict, optional `neo4j_governance_kg_drift_smoke` to pre_commit profile, agent memory ADR trigger watch (default = I34 multi-tenant closure), 12-month ADR sunset review.

- **Initiative 45 — Live Eval Harness Modernisation: 9-phase unification + replay + cost + adversarial + promotion gate (2026-05-01)** — Collapses 3 drifting eval surfaces into one governed harness and adds what 2026 production agent systems take for granted: trace record-and-replay, registry-driven routing, per-skill cost+latency observability, adversarial canaries, tooling-enforced skill promotion gate. Field-grounded in 5 web sources (AgentEval Trace Record & Replay, MASEval, Abstract Algorithms 2026 three-plane registry, Inference.net 2026 LLM eval guide, Braintrust 2026 multi-agent tracing). **P0 — Bootstrap + audit**: 5 planning artifacts + decision-log with 7 D-IH-45-A..G decisions ratified at greenlight + [`audit-current-eval-surface-2026-05-01.md`](docs/wip/planning/45-live-eval-harness/reports/audit-current-eval-surface-2026-05-01.md) cataloguing the 3 drifting systems (`akos/eval_harness` from I10, `scripts/eval_per_skill.py` from I32 P9, the `%TEMP%/madeira_uat_inproc.py` D-IH-32-Q9 pattern). **P1 — Unify into v2**: converted [`akos/eval_harness.py`](akos/eval_harness/__init__.py) (single 42-line file from I10) into a package; new [`akos/eval_harness/v2.py`](akos/eval_harness/v2.py) with `Scorecard`/`ScoreRow` dataclasses + 4 mode runners (smoke / canary / rubric / replay); new [`scripts/eval.py`](scripts/eval.py) unified CLI with `--mode {rubric,canary,replay,smoke,adversarial,all}` + record/promote subcommands; backward-compat shims at `scripts/run-evals.py` + `scripts/eval_per_skill.py` (deprecation warning silenceable via `AKOS_EVAL_NO_DEPRECATION_WARN=1`); 22 new tests. **P2 — Trace Record and Replay (AgentEval pattern)**: new [`akos/eval_harness/cassette.py`](akos/eval_harness/cassette.py) with JSONL cassette format (header + events + summary; 2 probe kinds: `classify_request` deterministic + `live_llm` requiring `AKOS_RECORD_LIVE=1`); 60/90-day staleness policy mirroring LiveBench-style awareness; 6 seeded cassettes under [`tests/evals/cassettes/<skill_id>/`](tests/evals/cassettes/) (one per current SKILL_REGISTRY row + a 2nd Madeira lookup); new `tests/evals/cassettes/.gitattributes` documenting R-45-4 synthetic-only discipline; 16 new tests. **P3 — Close Registry-Router gap (D-IH-45-A + R-45-6)**: 2 new columns on [`SKILL_REGISTRY.csv`](docs/references/hlk/compliance/dimensions/SKILL_REGISTRY.csv) — `routing_condition` (4-form DSL: `intent_in=R1;R2` / `intent=R` / `agent=A` / empty=always-eligible per Abstract Algorithms 2026 minimum-registry contract) + `tools_required_waived` (per-skill silencer for `tools_required` vs `agent-capabilities.json` reconciliation warning); new [`akos/skill_router.py`](akos/skill_router.py) (the missing middle of the registry-router triangle: `parse_routing_condition`, `matches`, `candidate_skills`, `candidate_skill_ids`); [`akos/intent.py`](akos/intent.py) `classify_request()` enriched with optional `agent` parameter and `candidate_skills: list[str]` response field (soft-fails to `[]` if registry unavailable; backward-compatible); validator extended with `ROUTING_CONDITION_RE` enforcement and waiver semantics; new migration [`20260501041500_i45_skill_registry_routing_columns.sql`](supabase/migrations/20260501041500_i45_skill_registry_routing_columns.sql); 24 new tests. **P4 — Cost + latency observability per skill (D-IH-45-D + D-IH-45-G)**: new [`akos/eval_harness/cost_obs.py`](akos/eval_harness/cost_obs.py) (compute_cost_usd from cassette-summary tokens × model-prices table; aggregate_skill_cost across cassettes for avg/p95 cost + p50/p95 latency; evaluate_cost_ceiling with PASS<10%/WARN 10-20%/FAIL>20% thresholds); new [`config/eval/model-prices.json`](config/eval/model-prices.json) (operator-edited USD per 1k tokens table; 5 model entries; FinOps-owned); 5 new POLICY_REGISTER rows `POL-EVAL-COST-CEILING-*` (one per skill with operator-set max_usd_per_run; SHARED-LOCALE = $0.0 to detect accidental LLM substitution into rule-based skill); new `policy_class` enum extension: `cost_ceiling`, `adversarial_floor`, `promotion_gate`, `graph_rag_eligibility` (4-class growth: I32 4 → I45 8); `--enforce-cost` CLI flag; `ScoreRow.cost_usd` / `latency_ms_p50/p95` populated; new [`compliance.eval_run`](supabase/migrations/20260501050000_i45_eval_run_mirror.sql) Supabase mirror (append-only event log; symmetric to I32 P1's `compliance.validation_runs`; deny anon+auth, service_role only); 20 new tests. **P5 — Adversarial cassettes + PII linter (D-IH-45-E + R-45-4 operationalized)**: new [`akos/eval_harness/adversarial.py`](akos/eval_harness/adversarial.py) with `BRAND_JARGON_RE` mirroring `BRAND_JARGON_AUDIT.md` §5 rg pattern + `scan_text_for_pii` with synthetic-pattern allowlist (example.com / 555-01XX IETF / RFC 5737 TEST-NET / private IPs / 000- 666- 9XX SSNs); new probe_kind `adversarial_classify_request` wired into replay dispatcher + new ScoreRow mode `adversarial`; 12 seeded adversarial cassettes (5 prompt-injection + 4 brand-jargon + 3 PII) across 5 skills under [`tests/evals/cassettes/adversarial/<skill_id>/`](tests/evals/cassettes/adversarial/); new [`scripts/lint_cassette_pii.py`](scripts/lint_cassette_pii.py) (caught real signal during seed authoring: 555-12-9999 SSN + 203.0.113.42 — both fixed); new POLICY_REGISTER row `POL-EVAL-ADVERSARIAL-FLOOR` cross-referencing the 3 madeira_* alerts in `config/eval/alerts.json`; 23 new tests. **P6 — Tier B weekly schedule (D-IH-45-C + R-45-3)**: new [`.github/workflows/eval-tier-b.yml`](.github/workflows/eval-tier-b.yml) — Monday 06:00 UTC cron + workflow_dispatch + cheap/flagship matrix + per-tier API key preflight + repo-var `AKOS_TIER_B_ENABLED` operator opt-in gate + 3 eval runs per tier (Tier A baseline + Tier B replay + Tier B adversarial) + scorecard artifact upload (90-day) + GitHub job summary; `--tier {A,B}` flag (B requires `AKOS_RECORD_LIVE=1`) + `--max-spend` kill switch (default $5; `MAX_TIER_B_USD` env override) + `--regression-pp` threshold (default 5pp); new verification profile `eval_harness_smoke` (Tier A only; 4 steps including PII linter); 11 new tests. **P7 — Skill promotion gate (D-IH-45-F + R-45-9)**: new [`akos/eval_harness/promotion.py`](akos/eval_harness/promotion.py) with 4-criteria check (Tier A green + Tier B within 14d (queries `compliance.eval_run`; SKIP with explicit reason until populated) + adversarial pass + non-empty `routing_condition`); `scripts/eval.py promote --skill X` enforces; `--override --reason '<text>'` audit-trailed bypass per R-45-9 (mandatory reason); new POLICY_REGISTER row `POL-EVAL-PROMOTION-GATE`; 17 new tests. **P8 — Closure**: full pytest sweep `1057 passed, 5 skipped, 2 pre-existing failures` (the 2 `validate_configs.py::TestOpenclawConfig` Pydantic openclaw.json sandbox-mode literal_error failures are unrelated to I45 — confirmed by `git diff` against the I32 baseline showing zero changes to openclaw.json.example, akos/models.py, or tests/validate_configs.py); UAT report + WIP_DASHBOARD re-rendered. **134 new tests across 7 NEW suites** (test_eval_harness_v2 23 + test_eval_cassette 16 + test_skill_router 24 + test_eval_cost_obs 20 + test_eval_adversarial 23 + test_eval_tier_b 11 + test_eval_promotion 17). **2 new mirror migrations** at `supabase/migrations/20260501{04,05}*_i45_*.sql` (skill_registry routing columns + eval_run mirror); operator applies via `npx supabase db push`. **6 new POLICY_REGISTER rows** (5 cost_ceiling + 1 adversarial_floor + 1 promotion_gate; total POLICY_REGISTER grew 14 → 20 rows). Closure trail at [`reports/uat-i45-live-eval-harness-2026-05-01.md`](docs/wip/planning/45-live-eval-harness/reports/uat-i45-live-eval-harness-2026-05-01.md). Operator follow-ups itemised: live LLM cassette recording (`AKOS_RECORD_LIVE=1`), repo-var + secrets for Tier B GitHub Action opt-in, `compliance.eval_run` migration apply.

- **Initiative 32 — Holistik Ops Maturation: 6-axis system + 3 new dimensions + cross-repo discipline (2026-04-30)** — Matures the I31 5-axis Holistik Ops doctrine into a production-ready, multi-tenant, multiagentic skill-based platform. Closes 6 artifact gaps + 1 Neo4j-projection-1-initiative-behind gap + 2 layout drifts + 0 prior cross-repo coverage. **P0 — Bootstrap**: 5 standard artifacts in [`docs/wip/planning/32-holistik-ops-maturation/`](docs/wip/planning/32-holistik-ops-maturation/) with **17 decisions D-IH-32-A..Q** (the 3 operator-answer decisions D-IH-32-O/P/Q hardened the I31 reseed gate, set bilingual-cover-email policy, and made Neo4j live sync mandatory) + KiRBe freeze memo + planning README row 32 + R-32-2 hard gate cleared (12 of 12 mirrors in parity at first probe, including the 4 I31-pending surfaces persona=16, channel=10, sourcing=1, goipoi=6 with new distance schema). **P1 — Validator graph split** (D-IH-32-F): refactored [`scripts/validate_hlk.py`](scripts/validate_hlk.py) into a dispatcher graph (24 inline + dispatched validator runs) + new [`compliance.validation_runs`](supabase/migrations/20260430233000_i32_validation_runs.sql) operational mirror (RLS deny anon + authenticated, server-only service_role; same posture as `finops.registered_fact`); new `--json` flag emits structured per-validator report; backward-compatible CLI preserved 100% (R-32-1 mitigation; legacy stdout banner + per-validator PASS lines unchanged); new akos contract [`akos/hlk_validation_run.py`](akos/hlk_validation_run.py); 14 dispatcher tests including I29/I30/I31 baseline regression. **P2 — Skill registry (7th canonical dimension, D-IH-32-B)**: new canonical [`SKILL_REGISTRY.csv`](docs/references/hlk/compliance/dimensions/SKILL_REGISTRY.csv) with 5 seed rows covering all 5 documented agents (madeira-lookup, architect-plan, executor-run, verifier-check, shared-locale-detect); 14-field schema with `tenant_scope` regex `^shared$` enforced per D-IH-32-J (until I34 opens tenant scopes for MADEIRA-SaaS productisation); new akos + validator + mirror DDL + topic_skill_registry row. **P3 — Touchpoint-kit cell registry (D-IH-32-C)**: new canonical [`TOUCHPOINT_KIT_CELL_REGISTRY.csv`](docs/references/hlk/compliance/dimensions/TOUCHPOINT_KIT_CELL_REGISTRY.csv) with 15 rows mirroring every (persona × channel × language) template file under `_assets/touchpoint-kit/` (8 distinct persona × channel combinations from I31); validator's **FS-vs-CSV drift detector** is the keystone invariant (planted-phantom regression test + planted-missing regression test, both with shutil-restore safety net). **P4 — Policy register (D-IH-32-Q4)**: new canonical [`POLICY_REGISTER.csv`](docs/references/hlk/compliance/dimensions/POLICY_REGISTER.csv) with 14 rows across all 4 classes (9 RLS + 1 service_role_rotation per I26 P2 quarterly cadence + 1 redaction per BRAND_JARGON_AUDIT + 3 PII scope including GOI/POI display_name obfuscation, FINOPS no-amounts-in-git, language frontmatter mandatory); **self-referential**: `POL-RLS-POLICY-REGISTER-MIRROR-I32` is itself a row. **P5 — Topic axis 6 promotion (D-IH-32-A)**: [`HOLISTIK_OPS_DISCOVERY.md`](docs/references/hlk/v3.0/Admin/O5-1/Operations/PMO/HOLISTIK_OPS_DISCOVERY.md) **upgraded to v2 (6 axes)**: title changed; new §1 axis 6 row + 3 substrate dimensions section; new §2.6 "Topic — what is this conversation about?"; new §3 routing flow with explicit `detect_topic` + `select_skill` steps; new "Worked example — `SKILL-MADEIRA-LOOKUP-V1` end-to-end" walking through 8 numbered routing steps. **P6 — Neo4j projection extension (D-IH-32-M)**: [`akos/hlk_graph_model.py`](akos/hlk_graph_model.py) extended with 6 new GraphLabels (`:Persona`, `:Channel`, `:Sourcing`, `:Skill`, `:TouchpointKitCell`, `:Policy`) + new `:UNDER_TOPIC` EdgeType + 6 new build functions + `build_holistik_ops_axis_graph` convenience union; [`scripts/sync_hlk_neo4j.py`](scripts/sync_hlk_neo4j.py) wired to project the new node labels; **dry-run reports `personas=16 channels=10 sourcing=1 skills=5 cells=15 policies=14 edges=2393 (incl. 14 program-side, 78 topic-side, 66 axis-6)`** matching CSV row counts exactly; live sync mandatory per D-IH-32-Q is **operator-pending** (NEO4J_URI not configured in agent execution environment; runbook in P5+P6 phase report). **P7 — Layout drift fixes (D-IH-32-D + D-IH-32-E)**: `git mv` of `GOI_POI_REGISTER.csv` from `compliance/` to `compliance/dimensions/` (last canonical knowledge dimension still at root) + `git mv` of `SOP-HLK_LOCALISATION_001.md` from `Tech/System Owner/` to `Marketing/Brand/` (Brand owns the policy; Tech owns the validator script which stays in scripts/); deprecation aliases active in [`scripts/validate_goipoi_register.py`](scripts/validate_goipoi_register.py), [`scripts/sync_compliance_mirrors_from_csv.py`](scripts/sync_compliance_mirrors_from_csv.py), [`scripts/render_pmo_hub.py`](scripts/render_pmo_hub.py), [`scripts/export_adviser_handoff.py`](scripts/export_adviser_handoff.py), [`scripts/validate_program_id_consistency.py`](scripts/validate_program_id_consistency.py), [`scripts/compose_adviser_message.py`](scripts/compose_adviser_message.py) for one initiative cycle (removed in I33). pinned to AKOS PRECEDENCE.md); new [`.cursor/rules/akos-mirror-template.mdc`](.cursor/rules/akos-mirror-template.mdc) (`alwaysApply: true`; references AKOS via stable GitHub URLs); new [`REPO_HEALTH_SNAPSHOT.csv`](docs/references/hlk/compliance/REPO_HEALTH_SNAPSHOT.csv) at `compliance/` (3 rows seeded from real local clones at `c:\Users\Shadow\cd_shadow\root_cd\<repo>`); new akos + validator + mirror DDL ([`compliance.repo_health_snapshot_mirror`](supabase/migrations/20260430233400_i32_repo_health_snapshot_mirror.sql) with append-only `(repo_slug, snapshot_date)` PK + partial index for "missing contract" dashboard query); new [`scripts/snapshot_external_repos.py`](scripts/snapshot_external_repos.py) (pull-based weekly + on-demand; configurable via `AKOS_EXTERNAL_REPO_ROOTS` env JSON). **KiRBe deep handoff (P9 in v0.2)**: [`config/sync/kirbe-sync-contract.md`](config/sync/kirbe-sync-contract.md) **§2 fully rewritten** to enumerate all 16 mirrors with `sync_direction; rls_posture; consumer_role` (was 3 mirrors); new §11 cross-repo contract codifying D-IH-32-K + the 4 things explicitly NOT changed (billing-plane discipline, LlamaIndex pipeline, local Neo4j per D-IH-32-M, existing 36 cursor rules); 6-section handoff memo + KiRBe v1.2 architecture audit memo (recommends 5 architecture-level deltas: persona-aware vault search, channel-tagged ingestion provenance, tenant-facing skill dashboard tile = MADEIRA-SaaS bridge, KiRBe Neo4j stays separate, cite policy_id from POLICY_REGISTER on every kirbe.* RLS rule). **ERP deep handoff (P10 in v0.2)**: dated [`reports/erp-handoff-bundle-2026-04-30/`](docs/wip/planning/32-holistik-ops-maturation/reports/erp-handoff-bundle-2026-04-30/) with **7 files** (00-README + 01-mirror-schema-map of 16 mirrors with example queries + 02-five-axis-integration-spec + 03-operator-sql-gate-pointer + 04-localisation-policy-pointer + 05-changelog-snippet (jargon-audit clean) + 06-team-sota-pointer); ERP architecture audit memo recommends 6 deltas including Q10 supersession path (akos-mirror.mdc takes precedence over local data-ssot.mdc rule that contradicts AKOS PRECEDENCE.md per E13); 5 things to NOT change documented (Next.js patterns, theme tokens, chart wrapper, Supabase Auth, hooks/components/lib pattern). **Boilerplate reference-only registration (P11 in v0.2, D-IH-32-N)**: new `class=reference` row in [`REPOSITORIES_REGISTRY.md`](docs/references/hlk/v3.0/Envoy%20Tech%20Lab/Repositories/REPOSITORIES_REGISTRY.md) with new "reference" class definition; light-touch (only EXTERNAL_REPO_CONTRACT.md, no cursor rule mirror because no `.cursor/rules/` exists); embedded Obsidian snapshot at `app/dashboard/applications/kms/obsidian-holistika-main/` explicitly NOT canonical (Initiative 43 deferred replaces with pointer). **3 PR patches + 6 bilingual cover-emails per D-IH-32-P** in [`reports/external-repo-seed-prs/`](docs/wip/planning/32-holistik-ops-maturation/reports/external-repo-seed-prs/) (kirbe.patch / hlk-erp.patch / boilerplate.patch + 6 cover-email drafts EN+ES per repo for operator forwarding). **P9 — Madeira eval harness + 5 skill drift canaries**: new [`scripts/eval_per_skill.py`](scripts/eval_per_skill.py) per-skill scorecard generator with `--threshold` (default 2.0pp) + `--current SKILL-ID=PCT` synthetic-injection support; 5 baseline JSONs in [`config/eval-baselines/`](config/eval-baselines/) frozen at SKILL_REGISTRY.csv eval_baseline_pct values; canary 2 (eval regression > threshold) **LIVE** with synthetic regression test that trips at -3pp on the verifier skill; canary 4 (validator FK reject) **LIVE** since P2; canaries 1/3/5 documented for operator (require live runtime). **P10 — WIP dashboard auto-render**: new [`scripts/render_wip_dashboard.py`](scripts/render_wip_dashboard.py) reads each `<NN>-*/master-roadmap.md` frontmatter + body and emits `docs/wip/planning/WIP_DASHBOARD.md` between `<!-- BEGIN AUTO -->` / `<!-- END AUTO -->` markers; planning README cross-link added. **P11 — Tests + UAT + closure**: **9 new test suites** across all phases (test_validate_hlk_dispatcher 14 + test_skill_registry 14 + test_touchpoint_kit_cell_registry 15 + test_policy_register 15 + test_holistik_ops_axis_graph 10 + test_layout_aliases 10 + test_repo_health_snapshot 14 + test_madeira_eval_per_skill 9 + test_wip_dashboard_render 8 = **109 new tests, all PASS**);
